medical: ❌ Do NOT move the person unnecessarily
❌ Do NOT give food or water
❌ Do NOT assume person is conscious
❌ Do NOT panic or delay calling ambulance
fire: ❌ Do NOT use elevators or lifts
❌ Do NOT open hot doors (test with hand first)
❌ Do NOT go back for belongings
❌ Do NOT hide in a room (unless no escape possible)
flood: ❌ Do NOT walk or drive through flood water
❌ Do NOT stay on ground floor in rising water
❌ Do NOT assume floodwater is clean or safe
❌ Do NOT wait for 'official' evacuation if water rising fast
❌ Do NOT return home until authorities clear it
women_safety: ❌ Do NOT confront the threat alone
❌ Do NOT go to an isolated location
❌ Do NOT trust the person if threatened
❌ Do NOT delay calling police (100 or 1091)
earthquake: ❌ Do NOT run outside during shaking (objects may fall)
❌ Do NOT stand in doorways (myth - not safe in modern buildings)
❌ Do NOT go up or down stairs during shaking
❌ Do NOT panic or scream (stay calm)
